name: Multiple injuries from one accident at job in Sandy, how does claim work?

mainEntity.name: Multiple injuries from one accident at job in Sandy, how does claim work?

acceptedAnswer.text: One claim for all; combined disability rating.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: File one claim covering all body parts; rated together for benefits.[4] Medical for each treated.[2] Key factors: detail all in report; comprehensive eval; combined impairment.[4] List everything initially, full diagnostics, attorney ensures nothing missed.[3] Avoids separate low settlements.

description: One claim for all; combined disability rating.[4]
